name: acacia nilotica
mechanism: High tannin content gives potent astringent properties; flavonoids and tannins provide antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects; polysaccharide-rich gum arabic may have immunomodulatory benefits.
effects: No direct effects data. Contextual inference: Folk medicine.. No direct mechanismofaction data. Contextual inference: Folk medicine.. Folk medicine. Folk medicine
contraindications: High doses of bark decoction can irritate the digestive tract and cause constipation or nausea
Avoid during pregnancy or lactation due to potential anti-fertility effects
